name: Order Processing Service (Hub-registered)
description: Example architecture showing Hub namespace metadata conventions — org.mybank/order-processing/v1.0.0. Demonstrates how a CALM architecture references its Hub registry location in metadata.

nodes.name: Order Portal
nodes.description: Customer-facing web application for placing and tracking orders.

nodes.name: Order Service
nodes.description: REST API service that handles order creation, updates, and fulfillment workflow.

nodes.name: Orders Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing order records, line items, and fulfillment status.

relationships.description: Order Portal sends order requests to the Order Service over HTTPS
Order Service reads and writes order records to the Orders Database
